title: azure-kv: slash in secret name accepted silently, fails confusingly at API
description: Trigger: URI secretx://azure-kv/my-vault/group/secret-name. split_path gives secret='group/secret-name'; from_uri succeeds. Azure KV does not allow '/' in secret names so get/put will return NotFound or BadRequest instead of InvalidUri. The test split_path_nested_secret asserts this behavior while its own comment says 'Secret names may not contain / in Azure KV' — the comment and assertion are contradictory. Fix: add validation in from_uri or split_path that the secret name component contains no '/'. A contributor reading the test will copy the pattern and create URIs that silently fail.
